game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **存在/しないあなた、と私 (You and I, Existing/Non-existing)** This is a short psychological horror visual novel where players primarily interact by tapping the screen to advance dialogue and narrative text. The core mechanic revolves around making critical choices presented as on-screen buttons, with over 100 distinct decision points influencing the story's progression and the protagonist's relationship with a mysterious girl. Each choice branches the narrative, leading to different dialogue sequences, character reactions, and ultimately one of approximately 12 unique endings that explore themes of existence and reality. Progression is achieved by unlocking new narrative paths through repeated playthroughs and selecting different choices, with the goal being to uncover the "world's truth" by experiencing all possible outcomes. The game features no explicit win or loss conditions beyond reaching a narrative conclusion, encouraging players to explore every branch of the story tree.
game_info.description: A mysterious psychological narrative game where you explore fragmented memories and conversations with a girl who may or may not exist. Navigate through branching dialogue trees by making choices that shape your reality. Uncover hidden truths by experiencing different story paths, each revealing pieces of a larger mystery. Complete all major story branches to discover the ultimate truth about existence and your connection to the mysterious girl.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys (UP/DOWN): Navigate between dialogue choices
SPACE: Advance dialogue text / Confirm choice
ENTER: Start game from title screen
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Return to title screen

TEST_1.test_description: Testing basic navigation and dialogue advancement. This validates that the player can navigate through the story, make choices, and advance dialogue without errors. Ensures the core mechanics of text display and choice selection work correctly.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Rapidly advance through dialogue using SPACE key and make random choices when presented. Navigate through multiple story branches by selecting available options. Continue until reaching an ending state.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Successfully navigate through at least one complete story branch from start to ending. All dialogue advances properly, choices are selectable, and game reaches a GAME_OVER state without errors. Test passes when an ending is reached.

TEST_2.test_description: Testing the win condition by completing all major story branches. This validates that the game tracks story progress correctly and triggers the final revelation ending when all paths have been explored.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Systematically explore all major story branches by making strategic choices that lead to different endings. Track which endings have been seen and prioritize unexplored paths. Continue playing through multiple runs until all endings are unlocked.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully unlock all major story branches and reach the true ending (GAME_OVER_WIN). The game should acknowledge completion of all paths and reveal the final truth. Test succeeds when gameState shows all endings discovered and true ending reached.

TEST_3.test_description: Testing choice navigation and selection mechanics. Validates that arrow keys properly highlight different choices and SPACE key correctly selects the highlighted option.
TEST_3.strategy_description: When choices appear, cycle through all options using UP and DOWN arrow keys. Verify selection highlighting updates correctly. Select each option at least once to ensure all branches are accessible.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: All choices are properly highlighted when navigating with arrow keys. Selected choices correctly trigger their associated story branches. No navigation errors or stuck states occur during choice selection.
